---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the WPVibe plugin (Vibe AI on WordPress.org)
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

What are you trying to accomplish with your AI assistant + WordPress that's currently hard or impossible?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see Vibe AI do? Be specific — examples of how you'd use it are useful.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've tried or thought about, including manual workarounds.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to related plugins or tools, prior discussions, anything else useful.
